Monday.breakfast: Muesli with Greek yogurt and strawberries
Monday.dinner: Beef pot roast with baby potatoes, carrots, and onion
Monday.helpers: JP leads pot roast assembly — Joseph peels potatoes — Michael rinses vegetables — Prep finger sandwiches for Tuesday shower
Monday.notes: Finger sandwiches (egg salad & strawberry cream cheese) made Monday afternoon for Tuesday shower lunch
Monday.prep_notes: 4:00 PM: Chop onions, carrots, potatoes. Sear beef in Dutch oven. 4:30 PM: Add broth, vegetables; cover and into oven at 325°F for 2.5 hrs. Finger sandwiches for Tuesday shower: prep Monday (cream cheese, strawberries, white bread — crusts off, cut diagonals). Chill overnight.

Tuesday.dinner: Leftover beef pot roast with baby potatoes and vegetables
Tuesday.helpers: Joseph reheats pot roast — Michael sets table
Tuesday.prep_notes: Reheat pot roast at 5:00 PM (low & slow, ~20 min covered). No cooking — busy day. Joseph reheats; Michael stirs sides.

Wednesday.lunch: Sardine salad with fresh greens (John: choice of leftover pot roast or chicken fried rice)
Wednesday.dinner: Baked flounder with rice and roasted vegetables
Wednesday.helpers: JP leads fish prep — Joseph assists with rice & vegetables — Michael washes vegetables
Wednesday.prep_notes: 11:30 AM: Make sardine salad (1 can sardines, mayo, Dijon, lemon, celery, red onion). Chill. 4:00 PM: Prep vegetables (broccoli, carrots). Season flounder fillets with lemon, dill, salt, pepper. 4:15 PM: Into oven at 400°F for 12-15 min. Rice on stovetop (20 min).

Thursday.lunch: Leftover baked flounder with rice and roasted vegetables — OR sardine salad with fresh greens (John: choice of leftover pot roast or chicken fried rice)
Thursday.dinner: Leftover baked flounder with rice and roasted vegetables
Thursday.helpers: Joseph: Reheat flounder & sides; Michael: stir vegetables
Thursday.prep_notes: Reheat flounder & rice at 5:00 PM (low oven, ~15 min covered). JP leads sheet pan chicken assembly at 5:00 PM for Friday dinner prep (bone-in thighs, potatoes, broccoli, oil, salt, pepper — ready to roast Friday). Joseph preps vegetables. Michael seasons.

Friday.breakfast: Boiled eggs, muesli, and fruit for John's Drill travel pack
Friday.lunch: Mac & cheese with frozen mixed vegetables
Friday.dinner: Pizza (using ingredients already in fridge) with simple salad
Friday.helpers: JP leads pizza assembly — Joseph preps salad — Michael pours drinks

Saturday.breakfast: Grilled cheese sandwiches with tomato soup
Saturday.lunch: Grilled cheese sandwiches with tomato soup
Saturday.dinner: Brined roast chicken with roasted broccoli, carrots, and snap peas
Saturday.helpers: JP leads brine prep & roasting — Joseph preps potatoes & sides — Michael washes vegetables
Saturday.prep_time: 20 minutes (brine prep: 7:00-7:20 AM; remove & season: 2:46-3:00 PM)
Saturday.prep_notes: 7:06 AM: Brine prep (20 min). 2:46 PM: Remove from brine, pat dry, season. 3:00 PM: Into oven at 425°F (40-50 min). Rest 10 min before serving at 5:00 PM.

Sunday.breakfast: Oatmeal with cinnamon and fresh fruit
Sunday.lunch: Chicken fried rice with aging fresh vegetables
Sunday.dinner: Chicken fried rice with aging fresh vegetables
Sunday.helpers: JP leads assembly — Joseph organizes leftover containers — Michael pours drinks
Sunday.prep_notes: Use roast chicken leftovers from Saturday. Aging vegetables: snap peas, carrots, broccoli, green beans. Shred chicken; stir-fry rice, veggies, and chicken. Batch-cook or reheat Sunday afternoon.
